description: Style NoteWondering what's comfy yet pretty enough to be worn with your favourite PJs or leggings? inaya comes up with this super soft top you can wear with night-clothes or with your denims for a quick grocery run! What's more it's organic - the  fabric (modal) is cellulose fiber extracted from beechwood!Product DetailsBlack V-neck top with satiny trims along the neck and placket region, short sleeves with slits on top and a curved and vented hemMaterial and CareShell: 93% modal 7% lycraTrim: 97% poly 3% spandexMachine wash at 40 degrees in gentle cycleDo not bleachTumble dry
